name: Crockpot Knockwurst and Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the knockwurst into 2-inch chunks.
2. In a crock-pot, arrange alternating layers of meat, onions, and cabbage.
3. Sprinkle with salt and caraway seeds.
4. Pour bouillon over all.
5. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 6 hours or until the cabbage is tender.
6. Makes 6 servings.... NOTE: If a more chewy texture in the knockwurst is preferred, add the meat during the last hour of cooking.
